QF.id: I Clearing Settlement and Risk Management_42

answer.text: Both intraday and at end of day, as per facility provided
Only when the position is closed

explanation.text: **The Logic:** CCs provide facility to release collateral both intraday and at end of day. This allows CMs to efficiently manage their collateral across markets. **The Trap:** Collateral release is not restricted to end of day — intraday release is available. **Cross-Exam Context:** Collateral management is tested in Series I and VII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Efficient collateral management (timely release and redeployment) is crucial for cost-effective trading operations.
